title: AutoPlantSeeds
description: Auto Plant Seeds automatically plants seeds and applies bone meal to connected farmland. Drop items on tilled soil and the mod intelligently affects only the connected farm area, respecting boundaries like water or gaps
body:
Auto Plant Seeds automatically plants seeds and applies bone meal to connected farmland. Drop items on tilled soil and the mod intelligently affects only the connected farm area, respecting boundaries like water or gaps.

Features:
- Automatic seed planting on connected farmland
- Mass bone meal application
- Smart area detection using flood-fill algorithm
- Supports 7 crop types: wheat, carrots, potatoes, beetroot, melons, pumpkins, torchflower
- Respects farm boundaries (won't cross water/gaps)
